frames: The agent begins in an upright posture, with its bottom segment starting to tilt slightly to the right.
The bottom segment continues to tilt further right, and the upper segment leans in the same direction.
The bottom segment is significantly angled to the right, with the upper segment following its lean.
The bottom segment is nearly horizontal, and the upper segment bends at the joint, leaning further right.
The bottom segment remains horizontal, while the upper segment swings left, forming a V-shape.
The upper segment continues its leftward swing, becoming almost parallel to the horizontal bottom segment.
The right end of the bottom segment begins to lift from the ground as the upper segment swings further left.
The bottom segment is now angled upwards on the right, and the upper segment has swung significantly left, appearing to attempt a recovery.
